description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build 32-Bit windows client that runs on push to core4, feature/* branches and on pull requests to core4 branch. The workflow should ignore changes to .github/workflows, snowballs2/, except for .github/workflows/cross-compile-client.yml. Use an ubuntu-24.04 job to check out the repository, set up reusable strings, install CMake 3.27.9, and then install dependencies including mingw-w64 and OpenSSL. Configure CMake with a mingw toolchain and Hunter, then build the project and upload the resulting 32-bit Windows client artifact.
